| In the superior court of the state
OF Washington. in and for the county
of Spokane.


Spokane International Railway
company, a corporation, plaintiff, vs.
| Edward M. Wright and Laura A.
| Wright, his wife, defendants.
To Edward NJ Wright and Laura
A. Wright, his wife, defendants:
You and each of you will please
take notice that the petitioner, the
Spokane International Railway COM
pany, has filed in the superior court
of the state of Washington, for Spo-
kane county, a petition directed to the
said court, setting forth that the
Spokane International Railway COM
pany is corporation organized under
the laws of the state of Washington,
engaged in the construction and oper-
alton of n line of railway beginning
in the city of Spokane, thence easter
ly to n point near the town of Rath-
drum, in the county of Kootenai,
state of Idaho. and thence In
northeasterly direction up the valley
of the Mooyie river. to the internal
tional boundary line between the
United States and Canada; that 1t Is
essential for the operation of it's lines
of railway, and the accommodation
OF the public using the same, that 1t
acquire those lands situate in Spo-
kane county. Washington, and de-
scribed as lots fifteen G5), sixteen
U6) and seventeen GD in block one
Cd of River Front Addition to Spo-
kane Falls (now Spokane), Washing
ton, for use for its right of way for
the line of It's said railway, and for
necessary sidetracks, depot grounds
and terminal yards: that the defend
ant Edward NJ. Wright, appears to be
the sole owner in fee of said realty.
and the defendant, Laura A. Wright,
has or claims to have some interest
In or lien upon said premises; and
that said petition prays that the
court empanel jury to ascertain and
determine the compensation to be
made in money to the owners of said
realty. and to all others interested
therein for the taking of said realty
by petitioner for the purposes afore-
said copy of said petition is here
to attached and herewith served upon
you.


And you, and each OF you. are here
by notified that on the 14th day of
July. 1905, petitioner will apply to
the superior court of the state of
Washington, for Spokane county. and
to the Honorable William a. Huneke,
judge thereof, at his courtroom in the
city of Spokane, at the hour OF $50
o'clock a, m, or as soon thereafter
as counsel for petitioner can be heard.
for hearing upon said petition, and
an adjudication by the court that the
taking of said realty Is for public USE
and la necessary to the business of
petitioner. and for tho fixing OF
time and place at which n jury may
he called to determine the compensa-
ton to be made therefor,


Dated this 10th day OF June, 1905.


ALLEN Il ALLEN,


Attorneys for Petitioner.


y. O. address: 61S Tho Rookery,
Spokane, Wash.
